project_types.display_name: Python Policy Analysis Platform (data + backend hybrid)

completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part with 2 parts: main (data/backend hybrid, Python 3.13+, 72 source files, 1374 tests) and frontend (React 19 + TypeScript, 46 source files). All 7 epics DONE.
Found 10 existing docs in docs/, 18 planning artifacts, 46 story files, 82 total artifacts across all categories.

Tech stack: Python 3.13+ (pyproject.toml/hatchling/uv), OpenFisca (optional), PyArrow, jsonschema, PyYAML, matplotlib. Frontend: React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Vite 7, Tailwind 4, Recharts, Radix UI. Testing: pytest 1374 tests, vitest. Quality: ruff, mypy strict, eslint, 80%+ coverage.

Exhaustive scan of all 72 Python source files (8 subsystems), 93 test files (1374 tests across 12 categories), 46 frontend files (20+ components, 4 layout, 11 simulation, 4 screens, 20 UI primitives). All data models, API surface, and component hierarchy documented.
Full annotated source tree generated covering src/, tests/, frontend/, notebooks/, examples/, config/, .github/, docs/, and _bmad-output/. All entry points documented.
Development guide updated with Python + frontend setup, build commands, CI pipeline (ruff/mypy/pytest/nbmake), deployment (Docker/Kamal/Hetzner), and coding conventions.
Architecture documentation regenerated with full subsystem details for all 8 implemented subsystems, data contracts, cross-cutting concerns, and Phase 2 extensions.
Supporting docs updated: project-overview.md, source-tree-analysis.md, development-guide.md, planning-artifacts-inventory.md (82 artifacts catalogued).

Master index.md regenerated with links to all 9 generated docs, 2 roadmap docs, 5 core product docs, 4 implementation planning docs, 3 validation docs, 6 research docs, 3 brainstorming sessions, 3 communication deliverables, branding, presentations, and website content.
Workflow complete. 6 documentation files regenerated in docs/.

findings.project_classification: Multi-part, 2 parts: Python backend + React frontend. Phase 1 fully implemented (7/7 epics done). 72 Python source files, 93 test files, 46 frontend files, 7 notebooks.
findings.technology_stack: Python 3.13+, OpenFisca (optional), PyArrow, uv, hatchling, pytest (1374 tests), ruff, mypy (strict). Frontend: React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Vite 7, Tailwind 4, Recharts. CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Docker, Kamal 2.
findings.existing_docs: 10 docs in docs/, 18 planning artifacts, 46 story files, 82 total artifacts across brainstorming/branding/communication/presentations/website/roadmap.
